items.title: WWDC 2026: Everything announced on Siri, iOS 27, Apple Intelligence and more
items.summary: Apple’s WWDC 2026 event kicked off this morning at 10 a.m. PT at Apple Park, starting a week full of expected announcements around Siri, iOS 27, Apple Intelligence and more, along with developer events and demos. This year’s event is particularly notable for a couple things. It marks CEO

items.title: Apple announces iOS 27
items.summary: Apple announced its next major iOS update, iOS 27, at WWDC 2026 on Monday. Apple is highlighting performance and design improvements, trust and safety upgrades like a Screen Time redesign, and major upgrades to Siri and Apple Intelligence. The update will be supported all the way back to the iPhone

items.title: Chip stocks bounced 10% on Monday. The smart money is buying insurance against the next drop.
items.summary: Micron surged 10% on Monday after losing 13% on Friday. Marvell jumped 9% on news of its addition to the S&P 500. The semiconductor sector bounced back from its worst single-day rout since 2020, when the Philadelphia Semiconductor Index fell roughly 10.3% and erased over $1.3 trillion in market valu

items.title: Apple announces macOS 27 Golden Gate with Siri AI and revamped Liquid Glass controls
items.summary: Apple has announced macOS 27 Golden Gate, the next version of its desktop operating system. items.title: Trump orders the military to adopt AI faster, protect models from China, and never let a vendor pull the plug
items.summary: President Donald Trump signed National Security Presidential Memorandum 11 on Friday, directing the US military and intelligence agencies to accelerate their adoption of advanced AI while protecting frontier models from theft by foreign adversaries.
